hub.metaTitle: Baise Group — One trusted network for home, health, and legal services in Brazil
hub.metaDescription: Three platforms, one promise. Find verified home service pros, doctors, and lawyers across Brazil. Choose your platform to start searching.

hero.subtitle: Find verified professionals across home, health, and law — all held to the Baise Group standard. Pick a platform below to start.

casa.title: Casa Baise
casa.blurb: Your home, in trusted hands. From a leaking pipe to a full renovation, find the pro you'd actually recommend.
bullets: Direct hire or competitive bids — your call
Secure payments in BRL with escrow protection

medical.title: Medical Baise
medical.blurb: Doctors, dentists, therapists, and specialists you can trust — booked in minutes, not weeks.

legal.title: Legal Baise
legal.blurb: Lawyers, notários, and legal experts — confidential, credentialed, and clear about pricing from day one.
bullets: Confidential consultations from the first message

sso.title: One Baise account. All three platforms.
sso.subtitle: Sign in once and we'll keep your verified profile, payment methods, and reviews in sync across Casa, Medical, and Legal Baise. Less friction, more trust.

verified.title: Verified pros
verified.desc: Identity and credentials checked on every platform — no exceptions.

bilingual.title: Multilingual
bilingual.desc: Português, English, Español — your choice, anytime, in every flow.

secure.title: Secure payments
secure.desc: Encrypted transactions, clear receipts, escrow when it matters.

local.title: Built for Brazil
local.desc: Local rules, local language, local trust signals — designed for the way Brasil actually works.

trust.line: Thousands of professionals across Brazil — and the people who hired them — pick Baise to find each other.

pros.title: Your safe space to grow your business.
pros.subtitle: Service pros, medical specialists, and legal experts — post your work, go live, share stories, and turn viewers into clients. Verified members only, vetted clients, and a feed that rewards great work.
